title: Bridge Over Troubled Water
why_this_song: Bridge Over Troubled Water by Simon & Garfunkel (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Like a bridge over troubled water"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Like a bridge over troubled water"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Like a bridge over troubled water"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "When you're weary"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I'll dry them all"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bridge" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bridge" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "troubled" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "troubled" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When tears are in your eyes
All your dreams are on their way

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Bridge Over Troubled Water" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Bridge Over Troubled Water" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Bridge Over Troubled Water" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Bridge Over Troubled Water" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Bridge Over Troubled Water" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Bridge Over Troubled Water"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
